// Get divisions with descriptions, registration counts, and capacity
		// Also get pending purchases (reservations) separately to avoid double-counting in joins
		const [divisions, pendingByDivision] = await Promise.all([
			db
				.select({
					id: scalingLevelsTable.id,
					label: scalingLevelsTable.label,
					teamSize: scalingLevelsTable.teamSize,
					description: competitionDivisionsTable.description,
					feeCents: competitionDivisionsTable.feeCents,
					maxSpots: competitionDivisionsTable.maxSpots,
					registrationCount: sql<number>`cast(count(${competitionRegistrationsTable.id}) as unsigned)`,
				})
				.from(scalingLevelsTable)
				.leftJoin(
					competitionDivisionsTable,
					and(
						eq(competitionDivisionsTable.divisionId, scalingLevelsTable.id),
						eq(competitionDivisionsTable.competitionId, data.competitionId),
					),
				)
				.leftJoin(
					competitionRegistrationsTable,
					and(
						eq(competitionRegistrationsTable.divisionId, scalingLevelsTable.id),
						eq(competitionRegistrationsTable.eventId, data.competitionId),
						ne(
							competitionRegistrationsTable.status,
							REGISTRATION_STATUS.REMOVED,
						),
					),
				)
				.where(eq(scalingLevelsTable.scalingGroupId, scalingGroupId))
				.groupBy(
					scalingLevelsTable.id,
					competitionDivisionsTable.description,
					competitionDivisionsTable.feeCents,
					competitionDivisionsTable.maxSpots,
				)
				.orderBy(scalingLevelsTable.position),
			// Count pending purchases (reservations) per division
			db

1322→export const removeRegistrationFn = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
  1323→	.inputValidator((data: unknown) => removeRegistrationInputSchema.parse(data))
  1324→	.handler(async ({ data: input }) => {
  1325→		const session = await getSessionFromCookie()
  1326→		if (!session?.userId) throw new Error("Unauthorized")
  1327→
  1328→		const db = getDb()
  1329→
  1330→		updateRequestContext({ userId: session.userId })
  1331→		addRequestContextAttribute("competitionId", input.competitionId)
  1332→		addRequestContextAttribute("registrationId", input.registrationId)
  1333→
  1334→		// 1. Get competition to verify ownership and get organizing team
  1335→		const competition = await db.query.competitionsTable.findFirst({
  1336→			where: eq(competitionsTable.id, input.competitionId),
  1337→			columns: { id: true, organizingTeamId: true },
  1338→		})
  1339→
  1340→		if (!competition) throw new Error("Competition not found")
  1341→
  1342→		// 2. Require organizer permission (site admins bypass)
  1343→		if (session.user?.role !== ROLES_ENUM.ADMIN) {
  1344→			const team = session.teams?.find(
  1345→				(t) => t.id === competition.organizingTeamId,
  1346→			)
  1347→			if (!team?.permissions.includes(TEAM_PERMISSIONS.MANAGE_COMPETITIONS)) {
  1348→				throw new Error("Missing required permission: manage_competitions")
  1349→			}
  1350→		}
  1351→
  1352→		// 3. Get the registration and verify it belongs to this competition
  1353→		const registration = await db.query.competitionRegistrationsTable.findFirst(
  1354→			{
  1355→				where: and(
  1356→					eq(competitionRegistrationsTable.id, input.registrationId),
  1357→					eq(competitionRegistrationsTable.eventId, input.competitionId),
  1358→				),
  1359→			},
  1360→		)
  1361→
  1362→		if (!registration) throw new Error("Registration not found")
  1363→
  1364→		if (registration.status === REGISTRATION_STATUS.REMOVED) {
  1365→			throw new Error("Registration is already removed")
  1366→		}
  1367→
  1368→		logInfo({
  1369→			message: "[Registration] Removing registration",
  1370→			attributes: {
  1371→				registrationId: input.registrationId,
  1372→				competitionId: input.competitionId,
  1373→				userId: registration.userId,
  1374→				athleteTeamId: registration.athleteTeamId ?? "none",
  1375→			},
  1376→		})
  1377→
  1378→		// 4. Set registration status to REMOVED
  1379→		await db
  1380→			.update(competitionRegistrationsTable)
  1381→			.set({
  1382→				status: REGISTRATION_STATUS.REMOVED,
  1383→				updatedAt: new Date(),
  1384→			})
  1385→			.where(eq(competitionRegistrationsTable.id, input.registrationId))
  1386→
  1387→		// 5. Deactivate the captain's team membership in the competition_event team
  1388→		await db
  1389→			.update(teamMembershipTable)
  1390→			.set({ isActive: false })
  1391→			.where(eq(teamMembershipTable.id, registration.teamMemberId))
  1392→
  1393→		// 6. For team registrations, deactivate all athlete team memberships and cancel invitations

/**
 * Competition Leaderboard Server Logic
 *
 * Provides leaderboard calculation for competitions using the configurable
 * scoring system. Supports Traditional, P-Score, and Custom scoring algorithms
 * with configurable tiebreakers.
 *
 * @see docs/plans/configurable-scoring-system.md
 * @see @/lib/scoring/algorithms - Scoring algorithm implementations
 * @see @/lib/scoring/tiebreakers - Tiebreaker logic
 */

import { and, eq, inArray } from "drizzle-orm"
import { getDb } from "@/db"
import {
	competitionHeatAssignmentsTable,
	competitionHeatsTable,
	competitionRegistrationsTable,
	competitionsTable,
} from "@/db/schemas/competitions"
import {
	programmingTracksTable,
	trackWorkoutsTable,
} from "@/db/schemas/programming"
import { scalingLevelsTable } from "@/db/schemas/scaling"

/**
 * Division Results Publishing Server Functions for TanStack Start
 *
 * This file uses top-level imports for server-only modules.
 *
 * Handles publishing/unpublishing division results for competitions.
 * Results publishing controls visibility of division leaderboards/results to athletes.
 *
 * Results are published per event+division combination, allowing granular control
 * over which event results are visible for each division.
 */

import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start"
import { and, eq, inArray, isNotNull, sql } from "drizzle-orm"
import { z } from "zod"
import { getDb } from "@/db"
import {
	competitionRegistrationsTable,
	competitionsTable,
} from "@/db/schemas/competitions"
import {
	programmingTracksTable,
	trackWorkoutsTable,
} from "@/db/schemas/programming"
import { scalingLevelsTable } from "@/db/schemas/scaling"

/**
 * Athlete Score Submission Server Functions
 *
 * Server functions for athletes to submit their own scores in online competitions.
 * Includes validation for submission windows and score format based on workout scheme.
 *
 * OBSERVABILITY:
 * - All athlete score submissions are logged with user and event IDs
 * - Submission window status checks are logged
 * - Validation failures tracked for debugging
 */

import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start"
import { and, eq } from "drizzle-orm"
import { z } from "zod"
import { getDb } from "@/db"
import {
	addRequestContextAttribute,
	logEntityUpdated,
	logError,
	logInfo,
	logWarning,
	updateRequestContext,
} from "@/lib/logging"
import {
	competitionEventsTable,
	competitionRegistrationsTable,
	competitionsTable,
} from "@/db/schemas/competitions"
import {
	programmingTracksTable,
	trackWorkoutsTable,
} from "@/db/schemas/programming"
import { scoresTable } from "@/db/schemas/scores"
import type { TiebreakScheme } from "@/db/schemas/workouts"

/**
 * Competition Divisions Server Functions for TanStack Start
 * Port from apps/wodsmith/src/server/competition-divisions.ts
 */

import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start"
import { and, asc, count, eq, ne, sql } from "drizzle-orm"
import { z } from "zod"
import { type Database, getDb } from "@/db"
